Form 10-K — Annual Report

For the fiscal year ended December 31, 2023.

Item 7 — Management's Discussion and Analysis

During fiscal year 2023, the Company repurchased 12.5 million shares of its common stock for an aggregate cost of $1.8 billion. As of December 31, 2023, $3.2 billion remained available under the Board-authorized repurchase program.

Cash dividends paid during 2023 totaled $0.95 per share, an increase of 6% over fiscal 2022.

Capital expenditures for fiscal 2023 were $4.1 billion, primarily directed toward manufacturing capacity expansion and supply chain automation.
